name: Electrotherm (India) Limited
summary: Electrotherm (India) Limited manufactures and markets induction furnace, casting machines, transformers, sponge and pig iron, ferrous and non-ferrous billets/bars/ingots, ductile iron pipes, transmission line towers, and battery operated vehicles in India and internationally. It operates through Engineering & Project, Special Steel, and Electric Vehicle divisions. The company offers induction melting furnaces, electric arc furnaces, metal refining converters, refining furnaces, high speed continuous casting machines, power distribution and furnace transformers, induction heating and hardening equipment for heat treatment, and other equipment for steel plants and foundries; and turnkey solutions. It also provides corrosion resistant steel bars, cut and bend TMT bars, epoxy coated TMT bars, and other steel products; structures for transmission line towers, power sub-stations, solar power plants, and other engineering structures; and ductile iron pipes. In addition, the company offers electric bikes and scooters under the Yo Bykes brand name; battery operated two-wheelers; and motors, chargers, controllers, and converters. Further, it provides solar water heating systems under the eleCtra brand name. Additionally, the company offers services for steel melting and other capital equipment. Electrotherm (India) Limited was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Ahmedabad, India.
